Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Ketch Kloud Inc. To Provide Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents Set No. One And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $7,500 Against Defendant Ketch Kloud Inc. And Their Counsel Neda N. Dal Cielo And Veena Bhatia
Off Calendar Feb-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT KETCH KLOUD INC. TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET NO. ONE AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $7,500 AGAINST DEFENDANT KETCH KLOUD INC. AND THEIR COUNSEL NEDA N. DAL CIELO AND VEENA BHATIA

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to her requests for production, set one, from defendant Ketch Kloud, Inc., is denied. Plaintiff does not include a compliant separate statement or competent evidence of Ketch Kloud's discovery responses in her opening papers. The court further concludes that Plaintiff failed to satisfy her meet and confer obligation.

Defendant seeks sanctions. The court concludes that the totality of circumstances would make the imposition of a sanction unjust and does not award sanctions. Order submitted to the court for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to her special interrogatories, set one, from defendant Jim Wangler, is denied. Plaintiff does not include a compliant separate statement or competent evidence of Wangler's discovery responses in her opening papers. The court further concludes that Plaintiff failed to satisfy her meet and confer obligation.

Defendant seeks sanctions. The court concludes that the totality of circumstances would make the imposition of a sanction unjust and does not award sanctions. Order submitted to the court for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
